metadata.description: Enterprise AI agents and skills for business, engineering, architecture, Java, and React Native workflows.

plugins.name: jira-story-generator
plugins.description: Generate structured Jira stories and acceptance criteria from business requirements.

plugins.name: mr-description
plugins.description: Generate structured pull request and merge request descriptions from code changes.

plugins.name: release-notes-generator
plugins.description: Generate release notes from completed changes, stories, commits, and pull requests.

plugins.name: java-unit-test-coverage
plugins.description: Analyze Java unit-test coverage gaps and generate JUnit and Mockito tests.

plugins.name: java-jacoco-analysis
plugins.description: Analyze JaCoCo coverage reports and identify high-priority Java coverage gaps.

plugins.name: java-code-cleanup
plugins.description: Review and safely clean Java code without changing expected behavior.

plugins.name: react-native-unit-test-coverage
plugins.description: Analyze Jest coverage and generate React Native unit and component tests.

plugins.name: react-native-code-cleanup
plugins.description: Review and safely clean React Native JavaScript and TypeScript code.

plugins.name: technical-design-generator
plugins.description: Generate technical design documentation from requirements and source code.

plugins.name: architecture-diagram-generator
plugins.description: Generate architecture and Mermaid diagrams from requirements and source code.

plugins.name: code-documentation-generator
plugins.description: Generate functional and technical documentation from source code.
